memberdef.name: MR_FORMAT_REGISTRY_EXTERNAL_DECL
memberdef.initializer: API_ATTR ProcName MR_CONCAT( get, ProcName )( const IOFilter& filter ); \ API_ATTR ProcName MR_CONCAT( get, ProcName )( const std::string& extension ); \ API_ATTR void MR_CONCAT( set, ProcName )( const IOFilter& filter, ProcName proc, int8_t priorityScore = 0 ); \ API_ATTR const IOFilters& getFilters();

memberdef.name: MR_FORMAT_REGISTRY_DECL
memberdef.initializer: MR_FORMAT_REGISTRY_EXTERNAL_DECL( MRMESH_API, ProcName )

memberdef.name: MR_FORMAT_REGISTRY_IMPL
memberdef.initializer: ProcName MR_CONCAT( get, ProcName )( const IOFilter& filter ) \ { \ return FormatRegistry<ProcName>::getProcessor( filter ); \ } \ ProcName MR_CONCAT( get, ProcName )( const std::string& extension ) \ { \ return FormatRegistry<ProcName>::getProcessor( extension ); \ } \ void MR_CONCAT( set, ProcName )( const IOFilter& filter, ProcName processor, int8_t priorityScore ) \ { \ FormatRegistry<ProcName>::setProcessor( filter, processor, priorityScore ); \ } \ const IOFilters& getFilters() \ { \ return FormatRegistry<ProcName>::getFilters(); \ }

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_MESH_SAVER
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::MeshSave; setMeshSaver( filter, { static_cast<MeshFileSaver>( saver ), static_cast<MeshStreamSaver>( saver ), caps } ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_MESH_SAVER_WITH_PRIORITY
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::MeshSave; setMeshSaver( filter, { static_cast<MeshFileSaver>( saver ), static_cast<MeshStreamSaver>( saver ), caps }, priority ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_LINES_LOADER
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::LinesLoad; setLinesLoader( filter, { static_cast<LinesFileLoader>( loader ), static_cast<LinesStreamLoader>( loader ) } ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_LINES_LOADER_WITH_PRIORITY
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::LinesLoad; setLinesLoader( filter, { static_cast<LinesFileLoader>( loader ), static_cast<LinesStreamLoader>( loader ) }, priority ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_LINES_SAVER
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::LinesSave; setLinesSaver( filter, { static_cast<LinesFileSaver>( saver ), static_cast<LinesStreamSaver>( saver ) } ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_LINES_SAVER_WITH_PRIORITY
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::LinesSave; setLinesSaver( filter, { static_cast<LinesFileSaver>( saver ), static_cast<LinesStreamSaver>( saver ) }, priority ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_POINTS_LOADER
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::PointsLoad; setPointsLoader( filter, { static_cast<PointsFileLoader>( loader ), static_cast<PointsStreamLoader>( loader ) } ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_POINTS_SAVER
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::PointsSave; setPointsSaver( filter, { static_cast<PointsFileSaver>( saver ), static_cast<PointsStreamSaver>( saver ) } ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_IMAGE_LOADER
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::ImageLoad; setImageLoader( filter, loader ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_IMAGE_LOADER_WITH_PRIORITY
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::ImageLoad; setImageLoader( filter, loader, priority ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_IMAGE_SAVER
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::ImageSave; setImageSaver( filter, saver ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_IMAGE_SAVER_WITH_PRIORITY
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::ImageSave; setImageSaver( filter, saver, priority ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_OBJECT_LOADER
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::ObjectLoad; setObjectLoader( filter, loader ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_OBJECT_SAVER
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::ObjectSave; setObjectSaver( filter, saver ); };

memberdef.name: MR_ADD_SCENE_LOADER
memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::SceneLoad; setSceneLoader( filter, loader ); };

memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::SceneLoad; setSceneLoader( filter, loader, priority ); };

memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::SceneSave; setSceneSaver( filter, saver ); };

memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::SceneSave; setSceneSaver( filter, saver, priority ); };

memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::DistanceMapLoad; setDistanceMapLoader( filter, loader ); };

memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::DistanceMapLoad; setDistanceMapLoader( filter, loader, priority ); };

memberdef.initializer: MR_ON_INIT { using namespace MR::DistanceMapSave; setDistanceMapSaver( filter, saver ); };
